context: R2 of this BUILD spec cited adversarial reviews (phase-0-20260421T204226Z.json and phase-0-20260421T204539Z.json) which have artifact_path .buildrunner/plans/spec-draft-plan.md — the research-library remediation plan, not this BUILD.
